law_title_en: Act Amending Note 5 of the Act Amending the Act on Increasing Agricultural Credits
law_summary_en: This act amends Note 5 of the earlier act that amended the law increasing agricultural credits.

law_title_en: Decree on Adding Four Clauses to a Part ... Executive Bylaw of the Export and Import Regulations Act
law_summary_en: This decree adds four clauses to a part of the executive bylaw implementing the Export and Import Regulations Act.

law_title_en: Addition of Notes 5 and 6 to Article 8 of the Amendment ... Free Trade-Industrial Zones of the Islamic Republic of Iran
law_summary_en: This adds Notes 5 and 6 to Article 8 of the law governing the free trade-industrial zones of the Islamic Republic of Iran.

law_title_en: Amendment to the Note under Article 3 of the Executive Bylaw on Credit Facilities for the Employment of War-Displaced Migrants
law_summary_en: This amends the note under Article 3 of the executive bylaw on credit facilities for employing people displaced by the Imposed War.

law_title_en: Executive Bylaw of the Act on the Repayment of Bonds for Expanding Ownership of Production Units
law_summary_en: This bylaw implements the act on repaying bonds issued to expand ownership of production units.

law_title_en: Amendment to the Executive Bylaw of the Export and Import Regulations Act
law_summary_en: This amends the executive bylaw implementing the Export and Import Regulations Act.

law_title_en: Amendment to Article 4 of the Executive Bylaw of the Export and Import Regulations Act, Approved in 1372 (1993/94)
law_summary_en: This amends Article 4 of the executive bylaw of the Export and Import Regulations Act, which was approved in 1372 (1993/94).

law_title_en: Amendment to the Executive Bylaw of the Export and Import Regulations Act
law_summary_en: This amends the executive bylaw implementing the Export and Import Regulations Act.

law_title_en: Amendment to the Executive Bylaw on the Collection of Duties in the Free Trade-Industrial Zones of the Islamic Republic of Iran
law_summary_en: This amends the executive bylaw governing the collection of duties in the free trade-industrial zones of the Islamic Republic of Iran.

law_title_en: Amendment to the Directive and Executive Procedure of the Bylaw on the Collection of Duties in the Free Trade-Industrial Zones
law_summary_en: This amends the directive and implementation procedure for the bylaw on collecting duties in the free trade-industrial zones.

law_title_en: Amendment to Decree No. 49751/T55549H ... Executive Bylaw of the Export and Import Regulations Act
law_summary_en: This amends Decree No. 49751/T55549H concerning the executive bylaw of the Export and Import Regulations Act.

law_title_en: Amendment to Decree No. 55327/T20486K Dated 1/10/1377 (December 22, 1998) on the Addition of Note (3) to Amended Clause 8 of the Directive and Implementation Method of the Bylaw on the Collection of Charges in Free Trade-Industrial Zones
law_summary_en: This amendment adds note 3 to amended clause 8 of the directive and implementation procedure for the bylaw on collecting charges in free trade-industrial zones, revising Decree No. 55327/T20486K of 1/10/1377 (December 22, 1998).

law_title_en: Bylaw for Implementing the Note to Clause (a) of an Article ... General Policies of Article 44 of the Constitution
law_summary_en: This bylaw implements the note to clause (a) of an article concerning the general policies of Article 44 of the Constitution.

law_title_en: Directive on the Initial Offering and Secondary Trading of Participation Bonds on the Securities Exchange
law_summary_en: Sets rules for the initial offering and secondary-market trading of participation bonds on Iran's securities exchange.

law_title_en: Directive on the Issuance of Ijarah Bonds
law_summary_en: Establishes procedures for issuing Ijarah (lease-based) bonds in Iran's capital market.

law_title_en: Directive on the Purchase, Sale, Transport, and Keeping of Live Livestock
law_summary_en: Sets rules governing the purchase, sale, transport, and keeping of live livestock.

law_title_en: Directive on the Settlement of Foreign-Currency Debts of Executive Agencies
law_summary_en: Sets out procedures for government executive agencies to settle their foreign-currency debts.

law_title_en: Bylaw Concerning Coupons and Rationing Booklets
law_summary_en: Regulates the use of coupons and rationing booklets for distributing rationed goods.

law_title_en: Ruling No. 762-761-760 of the General Board of the Administrative Justice Court ... Regarding Purchase of Subsidized Petroleum Products Outside the Distribution Network
law_summary_en: A ruling by the General Board of Iran's Administrative Justice Court concerning the purchase of subsidized petroleum products outside the official distribution network; the source title is truncated in the original record.

law_title_en: Ruling No. 25 of the General Board of the Administrative Justice Court ... Dated 21/12/1372 (March 12, 1994), Regarding Value-Added Duty
law_summary_en: A ruling by the General Board of Iran's Administrative Justice Court, dated March 12, 1994, concerning value-added duty; the source title is truncated in the original record.

law_title_en: Legal Bill Amending the Legal Bill Concerning the Extension of the 1357 (1978-1979) Fiscal Year of All Nationalized Banks and Credit Institutions until 17/3/1358 (June 7, 1979)
law_summary_en: This legal bill amends an earlier legal bill that had extended the 1357 (1978-1979) fiscal year of all nationalized banks and credit institutions until 17/3/1358 (June 7, 1979).

law_title_en: Legal Bill Authorizing the Central Bank of Iran to Grant a Loan of Three Billion Rials to Bank Maskan (Housing Bank)
law_summary_en: This legal bill authorizes the Central Bank of Iran to grant a three billion rial loan to Bank Maskan, the state housing bank.

law_title_en: Act Extending the Time Limits Prescribed in Article 40 of the Bylaw ... and Adding Eight Articles to the Land Reform Bylaw
law_summary_en: An act extending deadlines set in article 40 of a related bylaw and adding eight articles to the Land Reform Bylaw; the source title is truncated in the original record.

law_title_en: Legal Bill on Increasing the Amount of Loans ... under Contracts with Tobacco Growers and Tea Growers Approved in the Year 1347 (1968/69)
law_summary_en: A legal bill increasing loan amounts extended under 1347 (1968/69) contracts with tobacco and tea growers; the source title is truncated in the original record.

law_title_en: Act Authorizing the Payment of Export Bonuses for Goods Exported in the Year 1381 (2002/03) from the Year 1382 (2003/04) Budget Credits
law_summary_en: Authorizes payment, from the 1382 (2003/04) budget, of export bonuses for goods exported during 1381 (2002/03).

law_title_en: Legal Bill on the Method of Securing Customs Duties and Commercial Benefit Tax and Extending Collection Guarantee Letters
law_summary_en: A legal bill setting out how customs duties and commercial benefit tax are secured and extending the validity of related collection guarantee letters.

law_title_en: Amendment to Note 4 of the Act on the Amendment and Implementation of the Customs Tariff
law_summary_en: Amends note 4 of the act governing the amendment and implementation of Iran's customs tariff.

law_title_en: Act Authorizing the Exchange of the Second Supplementary Agreement to the Oil and Gas Sales Agreement Approved in Aban 1333 (October/November 1954)
law_summary_en: Authorizes the government to exchange the second supplementary agreement to the 1333 (1954) oil and gas sales agreement.

law_title_en: Act Authorizing the Transfer of a Fifty Percent Undivided Share of the Rights and Interests of the Continental Oil Company of Iran to the Phillips Petroleum Company of Iran
law_summary_en: This act authorizes the transfer of a fifty percent undivided share of the rights and interests of the Continental Oil Company of Iran to the Phillips Petroleum Company of Iran.

law_title_en: Act Amending Certain Articles of the Third Economic, Social, and Cultural Development Plan Act of the Islamic Republic of Iran and Its Subsequent Amendments
law_summary_en: Amends certain provisions of Iran's Third Economic, Social, and Cultural Development Plan Act and its later amendments; the source title is truncated in the original record.

law_title_en: Act on Financial, Administrative, and Employment Regulations of the Ministry of Agricultural Jihad
law_summary_en: Establishes financial, administrative, and employment regulations for the Ministry of Agricultural Jihad.

law_title_en: Act Amending Clause (h) of Note 3 of the Budget Law for the Year 1372 (1993/94)
law_summary_en: Amends clause (h) of note 3 of the budget law for the year 1372 (1993/94).

law_title_en: Act Amending Clause (b) of Note 2 of the Budget Law for the Year 1372 (1993/94)
law_summary_en: Amends clause (b) of note 2 of the budget law for the year 1372 (1993/94).

law_title_en: Rejection of the Bill to Add a Note to Clause 10 of Article 1 of the Land Reform Amendment Act
law_summary_en: Records the rejection of a bill that would have added a note to clause 10 of article 1 of the Land Reform Amendment Act.

law_title_en: Directive on the Method of Determining the Purchase and Sale Price of Securities in Investment Funds
law_summary_en: Sets out the method for determining purchase and sale prices of securities within investment funds.

law_title_en: Amendment to Article 4 of the Executive Bylaw of the Note to Article 77 of the Act on Combating the Smuggling of Goods and Currency
law_summary_en: Amends article 4 of the executive bylaw implementing the note to article 77 of the Act on Combating the Smuggling of Goods and Currency.

law_title_en: Amendment to the Executive Bylaw for Clause (t) of Note 9 of the Budget Law for the Year 1379 (2000/01)
law_summary_en: Amends the executive bylaw implementing clause (t) of note 9 of the budget law for the year 1379 (2000/01).

law_title_en: Amendment to the Executive Bylaw of Note 16 of the Budget Law for the Year 1373 (1994/95)
law_summary_en: Amends the executive bylaw implementing note 16 of the budget law for the year 1373 (1994/95).

law_title_en: Amendment to the Executive Bylaw of Article (61) of the Act on the Collection of Certain Government Revenues and Their Expenditure for Specified Purposes
law_summary_en: This amendment revises the executive bylaw for Article 61 of the law on collecting certain government revenues and spending them for designated purposes.

law_title_en: Addition of Text as Notes (1) and (2) to Clause (28) of the Executive Regulations of the National Budget for Year 1387 (2008-2009)
law_summary_en: This decree adds notes 1 and 2 to clause 28 of the executive regulations governing the 1387 (2008-2009) national budget.

law_title_en: Addendum to the Notes of Articles 7 and 12 of the Executive Bylaws of the National Budget Acts for Years 1393 (2014-2015) and 1394 (2015-2016)
law_summary_en: This addendum adds provisions to the notes of Articles 7 and 12 of the executive bylaws for the 1393 (2014-2015) and 1394 (2015-2016) national budget acts.

law_title_en: Decree Concerning the Addition of a Note to Sub-item (2) of Item (a) of Clause (11) of the Executive Regulations of the National Budget for Year 1382 (2003-2004)
law_summary_en: This decree adds a note to sub-item 2 of item (a) of clause 11 of the executive regulations for the 1382 (2003-2004) national budget.

law_title_en: Decree No. 36113/T27538H Dated 30 ... on Government Discretionary Punishments (Ta'zirat) Concerning the Smuggling of Goods and Currency
law_summary_en: A cabinet decree concerning government discretionary punishments (ta'zirat) for the smuggling of goods and currency; the source title and date are truncated in the original record.

law_title_en: Directive on the Handling of Violations by Persons Subject to Article 35 of the Securities Market Act
law_summary_en: Sets out procedures for handling violations by persons subject to article 35 of the Securities Market Act.

law_title_en: Rules for the Use of Securities Offering Advisory Services
law_summary_en: Establishes rules governing the use of advisory services for the offering of securities.

law_title_en: Amendment to Decree No. 16449/T254K Dated ... Free Trade-Industrial Zones of the Islamic Republic of Iran
law_summary_en: Amends an earlier cabinet decree concerning the free trade-industrial zones of the Islamic Republic of Iran; the source title is truncated in the original record.

law_title_en: Legal Bill Concerning the Crediting of Funds Collected from Installment Payments on Land to the Capital Increase Account of the Agricultural Cooperative Bank of Iran
law_summary_en: This legal bill directs that funds collected from installment payments on land be credited to the capital increase account of the Agricultural Cooperative Bank of Iran.

law_title_en: Act Amending the Act on the Issuance of Treasury Bills and Bonds
law_summary_en: Amends the act governing the issuance of treasury bills and bonds.

law_title_en: Act Authorizing the Application of the Minimum Customs Tariff to Merchandise from Iraq
law_summary_en: Authorizes applying the minimum customs tariff rate to merchandise originating from Iraq.

law_title_en: Act Authorizing the Determination of Customs Ground-Rent and Warehousing Fees
law_summary_en: Authorizes the government to set customs ground-rent (storage) and warehousing fees.

law_title_en: Legal Bill Adding a Note to the Legal Bill on Customs Duty Exemption for Vegetable Oil, Approved 11/7/1358 (October 3, 1979)
law_summary_en: A legal bill adding a note to an earlier legal bill that exempted vegetable oil from customs duties, approved October 3, 1979.

law_title_en: National Budget Act for Year 1306 (1927-1928) and Authorization to Pay National Expenditures as Determined by the Budget Commission in Esfand 1306 (February-March 1928)
law_summary_en: This act establishes the national budget for the year 1306 (1927-1928) and authorizes national expenditures to be paid as determined by the Budget Commission in Esfand 1306 (February-March 1928).

law_title_en: Act on the Employment of Technical Staff from Graduates of the Tirtash Technical School in Mazandaran
law_summary_en: Authorizes hiring technical personnel from among the graduates of the Tirtash Technical School in Mazandaran.

law_title_en: Legal Bill on Completing Certain Articles of the Land Reform Act
law_summary_en: A legal bill supplementing certain articles of the Land Reform Act.

law_title_en: Amendment to Article 10 of the Land Reform Amendment Act
law_summary_en: Amends article 10 of the Land Reform Amendment Act.

law_title_en: Legal Bill on the Method of Securing Customs Duties and Commercial Benefit Tax and Extending Collection Guarantee Letters
law_summary_en: A legal bill setting out how customs duties and commercial benefit tax are secured and extending the validity of related collection guarantee letters.

law_title_en: Declaration that the Cabinet Decree on the Collection of Asphalt Duty from Automobiles Assembled in Iran Is No Longer in Effect
law_summary_en: Declares moot a cabinet decree that had imposed an asphalt duty on automobiles assembled in Iran.

law_title_en: Act on the Forgiveness of All Government Claims for Rangeland Fees and Livestock Grazing Fines
law_summary_en: Forgives all outstanding government claims for rangeland-use fees and fines for unauthorized livestock grazing.

law_title_en: Amendment to the Executive Bylaw of the Anti-Money Laundering Act
law_summary_en: Amends the executive bylaw implementing Iran's Anti-Money Laundering Act.

law_title_en: Amendment to the Executive Bylaw on Monetary and Banking Operations in the Free Trade-Industrial Zones of the Islamic Republic of Iran
law_summary_en: Amends the executive bylaw governing monetary and banking operations in Iran's free trade-industrial zones.

law_title_en: Amendment to Article (6) of the Pricing Regulations for Organizational Housing Annexed to the Executive Bylaw of the Act on the Sale of Organizational Housing
law_summary_en: This decree amends Article 6 of the pricing regulations for organizational (government-owned) housing annexed to the executive bylaw of the Act on the Sale of Organizational Housing.

law_title_en: Addition of Text as Note (3) to Article (16) of the Traffic Regulations for the Free Trade-Industrial Zones of the Islamic Republic of Iran
law_summary_en: This decree adds note 3 to Article 16 of the traffic regulations governing Iran's free trade-industrial zones.

law_title_en: Amendment to Article 9 of the Bylaw on the Manner of Use of ... Free Trade-Industrial Zones of the Islamic Republic of Iran
law_summary_en: Amends article 9 of the bylaw governing the use of resources in the free trade-industrial zones of the Islamic Republic of Iran; the source title is truncated in the original record.

law_title_en: Amendment to Article 24 of the Executive Bylaw of the Export Regulations Act of 1365 (1986/87)
law_summary_en: This decree amends Article 24 of the executive bylaw implementing the 1365 (1986/87) Export Regulations Act.

law_title_en: Supreme Court Unified Procedure Ruling No. 3067 ... on Any Action Taken to Export Gold from the Country
law_summary_en: This Supreme Court ruling addresses the treatment of any action taken to export gold from the country.

law_title_en: Amendment to the Bylaw on Expanding the Use of Electronic Money Services
law_summary_en: This decree amends the bylaw governing the expansion of electronic money services.

law_title_en: Act on the Procedure for Reviewing and Closing Land Reform Case Files
law_summary_en: This law establishes the procedure for reviewing and closing land reform case files.

law_title_en: Determination of the Interest Rate on the Loan under Article 8 of Legal Decree No. 23156, from Four Percent to Six Percent
law_summary_en: This decree raises the loan interest rate specified in Article 8 of Legal Decree No. 23156 from four percent to six percent.

law_title_en: Act Confirming the Government's Action to Reduce Customs Duties on Unassembled Radio and Television Parts
law_summary_en: This law confirms the government's decision to reduce customs duties on unassembled radio and television components.

law_title_en: Act Repealing Part of Clause (b) of Article One of the Act on Assistance for Developing the Export of Certain Export Goods
law_summary_en: This law repeals part of clause (b) of Article One of the act that provided assistance to develop exports of certain goods.

law_title_en: Rules on the Manner of Interaction between Each Capital Market Institution and Regulated Persons
law_summary_en: This regulation sets rules governing how each capital market institution interacts with the persons under its supervision.

law_title_en: Amendment to Articles 30 and 31 of the Executive Bylaw ... on Discretionary Punishments Concerning the Smuggling of Goods and Currency
law_summary_en: This decree amends Articles 30 and 31 of the executive bylaw on government discretionary punishments for smuggling goods and currency.

law_title_en: Directive on Market Making for Investment Units of Land and Building Funds
law_summary_en: This directive regulates market making activities for investment units of land and building funds.

law_title_en: Directive on Professional Qualification Approval for Managers of Financial Institutions
law_summary_en: This directive sets the requirements for approving the professional qualifications of financial institution managers.

law_title_en: Directive on Licensing and Activity of Listing Advisors
law_summary_en: This directive governs the licensing and activities of listing (admission) advisors.

law_title_en: Amendment to Article 2 of the Executive Bylaw of the Act on the Independence of Provincial Electricity Distribution Companies
law_summary_en: This decree amends Article 2 of the executive bylaw implementing the act on the independence of provincial electricity distribution companies.

law_title_en: Directive on the Formation and Registration of Active Associations in the Securities Market
law_summary_en: This directive sets out procedures for forming and registering active associations in the securities market.

law_title_en: Executive Directive on Reporting Procedures for Holders of Insider Information
law_summary_en: This directive establishes reporting procedures for persons who hold insider information.

law_title_en: Executive Directive on Portfolio Management, Including its Model Contract
law_summary_en: This directive regulates portfolio management activities and includes a model contract for the service.

law_title_en: Executive Bylaw of Sub-item (7) of Clause (d) of Article (48) of the Seventh Five-Year Development Plan Act of the Islamic Republic of Iran (Subject: Allocation of Presold Petrochemical Company Products, for Which There Is No Export Commitment, to Downstream Complexes or Units along the Value Chain)
law_summary_en: This executive bylaw implements a provision of the Seventh Five-Year Development Plan Act allocating presold petrochemical products with no export commitment to downstream complexes or units along the value chain.

law_title_en: Act on the Establishment of the Abadan and Khorramshahr, Jolfa, and Bandar Anzali Free Trade-Industrial Zones
law_summary_en: This law establishes free trade-industrial zones in Abadan and Khorramshahr, Jolfa, and Bandar Anzali.

law_title_en: Act Concerning the Natural Gas Sale and Purchase Contract with Mineraloelverwaltung Aktiengesellschaft
law_summary_en: This law approves a contract for the sale and purchase of natural gas between Iran and Mineraloelverwaltung Aktiengesellschaft.

law_title_en: Act Adding One Note to the Act on Support for Domestic Livestock Production
law_summary_en: This law adds a note to the act supporting domestic livestock production.

law_title_en: Interpretive Act on Article (33) of the Mining Act Approved on 27/2/1377 (1998) by the Islamic Consultative Assembly, with Subsequent Amendments and Additions
law_summary_en: This law provides an authoritative interpretation of Article 33 of the Mining Act of 1377 (1998), as subsequently amended.

law_title_en: Appropriation for Fixed Capital Investment Development Projects for the Year 1356 (1977/78)
law_summary_en: This law allocates funds for fixed capital investment development projects for the year 1356 (1977/78).

law_title_en: Appropriation for Fixed Capital Investment Development Projects for the Year 1355 (1976/77)
law_summary_en: This law allocates funds for fixed capital investment development projects for the year 1355 (1976/77).

law_title_en: Act Amending Note 3 of the National Budget Act for the Year 1372 (1993/94)
law_summary_en: This law amends Note 3 of the national budget act for the year 1372 (1993/94).

law_title_en: Decree Concerning the Administration of All State-Owned Factories as Joint Stock Companies
law_summary_en: This decree provides for all state-owned factories to be administered as joint stock companies.

law_title_en: Legal Bill on the Withdrawal of a Percentage of Highway Toll Revenues
law_summary_en: This legal bill authorizes the withdrawal of a percentage of collected highway toll revenues.

law_title_en: Bylaw on the Collection of Tolls from Motor Vehicles ... under the Tehran-Karaj Highway Act Approved on 31 Tir 1344 (1965)
law_summary_en: This bylaw sets out procedures for collecting tolls from motor vehicles under the Tehran-Karaj Highway Act of 1344 (1965).

law_title_en: Budget Act of the Islamic Consultative Assembly for the Year 1360 (1981/82)
law_summary_en: This law sets the budget of the Islamic Consultative Assembly for the year 1360 (1981/82).

law_title_en: Act on the Manner of Payment of Installment Bond Funds to Owners ... for the Transfer and Sale of Leased Property to Tenant Farmers
law_summary_en: This law regulates payments to landowners in connection with the transfer and sale of leased agricultural land to tenant farmers.

law_title_en: Act on the Handling of Cases of Persons with Overdue Debts to the Ministry of Agriculture and Rural Development or its Affiliated Institutions, with Subsequent Amendments and Additions
law_summary_en: This law establishes a process for handling the cases of persons with overdue debts owed to the Ministry of Agriculture and Rural Development or its affiliated institutions.

law_title_en: Act on Rules for Payment of Housing Loans to Freed Prisoners of War, War Veterans, and Families of Martyrs under Note 52
law_summary_en: This law sets rules for paying housing loans to freed prisoners of war, war veterans, and the families of martyrs, pursuant to Note 52.

law_title_en: Act Concerning the Waiver of Late Payment Penalties on the Annual Debt of Miandoab Farmers for Land Tenancy and the Installment of the Principal Debt
law_summary_en: This act waives late payment penalties on the annual debts owed by Miandoab farmers for land tenancy and allows the principal debt to be paid in installments.

law_title_en: Circular of the Trade Promotion Organization of Iran Regarding the List of Domestically Produced Catalysts for Year 1404 (2025-2026)
law_summary_en: This circular from Iran's Trade Promotion Organization publishes the list of catalysts produced domestically for the year 1404 (2025-2026).

law_title_en: Concerning the Implementation of the Rent Bylaw in 35 Cities
law_summary_en: This decree provides for the implementation of the rent bylaw in 35 cities.

law_title_en: Unified Procedure Ruling No. 519 of the Supreme Court Regarding Appeals of Civil Court Branch 2 Judgments in Disputes Concerning the Adjustment of Rent for Business and Trade Premises
law_summary_en: This Supreme Court unified procedure ruling addresses the appeal of Civil Court Branch 2 judgments in disputes over the adjustment of rent for commercial and business premises.

law_title_en: Supreme Court Unified Procedure Ruling No. 115 ... Concerning Foodstuffs and Other Daily Consumer Goods of the Public
law_summary_en: This Supreme Court ruling addresses matters concerning foodstuffs and other everyday consumer goods.

law_title_en: Ruling No. 71 of the General Board of the Administrative Court of Justice ... on the Progressive Calculation of Electricity Consumption Charges
law_summary_en: This ruling by the Administrative Court of Justice addresses the progressive method of calculating electricity consumption charges.

law_title_en: Determination that Cabinet Resolution No. 2278 dated 7/3/1369 (1990) on the New Telephone Connection Rate Does Not Conflict with the Law
law_summary_en: This ruling determines that a Cabinet resolution setting a new telephone connection rate does not conflict with the law.

law_title_en: Amendment to the Executive Bylaw of the Mining Act
law_summary_en: This decree amends the executive bylaw implementing the Mining Act.

law_title_en: Decree on the Ratification of the Executive Bylaw of Export and Import Regulations for the Year 1370 (1991/92)
law_summary_en: This decree ratifies the executive bylaw governing export and import regulations for the year 1370 (1991/92).

law_title_en: State Lands and Their Transfer
law_summary_en: This regulation concerns state-owned lands and the procedures for their transfer.
